headline: Can PayPal Beat Its Q2 FY26 Expectations Amid Tougher Trends?
summary: PYPL faces a tougher Q2 after a solid Q1, with slower branded checkout trends testing whether it can meet guidance and sustain investor confidence.

headline: Mizuho Keeps Outperform Rating on Block (XYZ), Backs Neighborhoods
summary: Block, Inc. (NYSE:XYZ) is one of the 10 Most Promising Fintech Stocks to Buy Now. On July 9, Mizuho reaffirmed its Outperform rating on Block, Inc. headline: What This Block Insider Sale Means as Cash App Gross Profit Jumped 38%
summary: This Block insider executed a sale under a pre-arranged Rule 10b5-1 trading plan adopted in March.
